heading: Exemptions
label: 80b–6a Exemptions
text: The Commission, by rules and regulations, upon its own motion, or by order upon application, may conditionally or unconditionally exempt any person or transaction, or any class or classes of persons, or transactions, from any provision or provisions of this subchapter or of any rule or regulation thereunder, if and to the extent that such exemption is necessary or appropriate in the public interest and consistent with the protection of investors and the purposes fairly intended by the policy and provisions of this subchapter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 14, 1970section 30 of Pub. L. 91–547section 80a–2 of this title
